name: Fried Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
Chopped fresh fennel or slivers of roasted red peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced bread and 1 clove garlic to the skillet. Fry until the bread is golden brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
3. Remove the bread from the skillet using a spatula and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
4. Spread puréed cannellini beans evenly over the fried bread.
5. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
6. Drizzle additional olive oil over the top of the bruschetta.
7. Garnish with chopped fresh fennel or slivered roasted red peppers, if desired.
8. Serve immediately and enjoy your Fried Bruschetta.
Yield: 2 servings
